title: Legacy Visible Barrier
body:
# Legacy Visible Barrier

Legacy Visible Barrier is a Legacy Fabric/ Ornithe mod for Minecraft 1.8.9.

When toggled, this mod allows you to see barriers the same way you see any other block.

Simply use the default keybind `B`, or change it under Controls.

## Requirements

- For Legacy Fabric Loader: [Legacy Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-fabric-api)
- For Ornithe Loader: [Ornithe Standard Libraries](https://modrinth.com/mod/osl)

## Acknowledgments

This project is inspired by [VisibleBarriers](https://modrinth.com/mod/visible-barriers) created by [Diabet](https://modrinth.com/user/Diabet).
